chapter goal: Explain how non-Euclidean geometry became legitimate through explicit models of the negated parallel postulate.
concept inventory: inner geometry versus an outside coordinate model
Euclid's five postulates and equivalent forms of the fifth postulate
Gauss, Bolyai, and Lobachevsky deriving a rich geometry from the negated fifth postulate
Beltrami's consistency model and Klein's projective streamlining
Beltrami-Klein disk: points inside a real conic, lines as chords, distances from boundary cross-ratio
Poincare disk: the same hyperbolic plane in a conformal model

library routing table.why: the chapter is about logical and model dependencies, not portraits

library routing table.concept: Klein disk lines and many parallels
library routing table.why: straight chords make the projective model inspectable
paired traces expose the same geodesics in two models
checks tie drawings to the model definitions

proof-visualization strategy: Use dependency graphs for axiom equivalences and model chronology; use invariant trackers for distance, angle, and parallel behavior.

visual sequence.inspection: equal intrinsic radial steps look smaller to the outside observer
visual sequence.validation: radii stay inside the disk and Euclidean step gaps decrease

visual sequence.inspection: which statements branch from the fifth postulate
visual sequence.validation: graph contains the five postulates and fifth-postulate equivalents

visual sequence.concept: parallel postulate failure in the Klein disk
visual sequence.inspection: many chords through one point miss the given chord
visual sequence.validation: more than one nonintersecting chord is counted

visual sequence.inspection: distance is read from the two ideal endpoints of a chord
visual sequence.validation: cross-ratio distance is positive and symmetric

visual sequence.inspection: straightness is traded for angle fidelity
visual sequence.validation: Klein-to-Poincare round trip residual is small

visual sequence.inspection: how formal systems became model comparisons
visual sequence.validation: timeline graph has directed paths to Klein and Poincare
